auth_forgot_checkEmail: Check your email for reset instructions
auth_forgot_subtitle: Enter your email to receive reset instructions
auth_logout_message: Are you sure you want to sign out?
auth_signup_privacy: I agree to the Privacy Policy
auth_signup_terms: I agree to the Terms of Service
common_confirmations_archiveItem: Are you sure you want to archive this item?
common_confirmations_delete: Are you sure you want to delete this item?
common_confirmations_deleteMultiple: Are you sure you want to delete {count} items?
common_confirmations_restoreItem: Are you sure you want to restore this item?
common_confirmations_unsavedChanges: You have unsaved changes. Are you sure you want to leave?
common_messages_contactSupport: Contact support if the problem persists
errors_messages_forbidden: You do not have permission to access this resource.
errors_messages_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors_messages_notFound: The requested resource was not found.
errors_messages_offline: Some features may not be available while offline.
errors_messages_timeout: The request took too long to complete.
errors_messages_validation: Please check your input and try again.
fillout_offline_quota_notice: You're offline, so we can't check remaining spots right now. Your eligibility will be re-checked when your answers are submitted.
fillout_share_exit_confirm_note: Clearing removes all your answers from this browser so the next person can't see them.
fillout_share_exit_done: This device has been cleared. It is safe to hand back.
fillout_share_exit_unsynced_warning: {count} answers on this device haven't been saved to the server yet.
fillout_sync_announce_all_saved: All answers saved to the server.
fillout_sync_announce_failed: {count} answers could not be submitted to the server. Download your answers to keep a copy.
fillout_sync_announce_pending: {count} answers pending, not yet saved to the server.
fillout_sync_now_offline_tooltip: You're offline — we'll sync automatically when you reconnect.
fillout_sync_offline: Offline — your answers are saved on this device
fillout_unsynced_banner: You have {count} unsaved answers on this device. Reconnect to save them.
help_steps_dashboard_analytics_descripti: Access powerful analytics including statistical tests, visualizations, and data export in multiple formats.
help_steps_dashboard_createNew_descripti: Click here to start building a new questionnaire. You will choose a project and configure basic settings.
help_steps_dashboard_projects_descriptio: Projects group related questionnaires together. Use them to organize by study, course, or research topic.
help_steps_dashboard_questionnaires_desc: Each card shows a questionnaire with its status, response count, and recent activity. Click any card to open it in the designer.
help_steps_dashboard_welcome_description: This is your research command center. Here you can see all your questionnaires, track responses, and monitor completion rates.
help_steps_designer_addQuestions_descrip: Choose from 17+ question types including text input, multiple choice, scales, matrices, reaction time, and more.
help_steps_designer_canvas_description: Your questionnaire appears here. Drag to reorder questions, click to select and edit. Switch between visual and structural views.
help_steps_designer_flowControl_descript: Set up conditional navigation: skip questions, branch to different paths, create loops, or terminate early based on responses.
help_steps_designer_help_description: Open the help panel for guided tours, contextual help, formula reference, and keyboard shortcuts.
help_steps_designer_overview_description: This is where you build and configure your questionnaire. The layout has three areas: tool rail (left), canvas (center), and properties (right).
help_steps_designer_preview_description: Test your questionnaire exactly as participants will see it. Check question flow, validation, and timing.
help_steps_designer_properties_descripti: Configure the selected question here. Set required fields, validation rules, display options, and advanced settings.
help_steps_designer_publish_description: Make your questionnaire available to participants. Generate a shareable link or QR code for distribution.
help_steps_designer_toolRail_description: Quick access to builder tools. Each icon opens a flyout panel with specialized tools for building your questionnaire.
help_steps_designer_variables_descriptio: Create computed variables that store values, calculate scores, and drive dynamic logic throughout your questionnaire.
help_steps_flowControl_add_description: Create branching, skip logic, loops, or termination rules based on participant responses.
help_steps_flowControl_condition_descrip: Write conditions using variable names and JavaScript expressions: age >= 18, consent === true, score > 50.
help_steps_flowControl_list_description: All flow control rules are listed here. Rules are evaluated in order during questionnaire execution.
help_steps_flowControl_target_descriptio: Select which page or question to navigate to when the condition is met.
help_steps_flowControl_types_description: Branch navigates conditionally, Skip jumps ahead, Loop repeats a section, Terminate ends the questionnaire.
help_steps_flowControl_visualEditor_desc: See and edit the entire flow as an interactive diagram with nodes and edges.
help_steps_reactionTime_practice_descrip: Add practice trials with feedback so participants can learn the task before data collection begins.
help_steps_reactionTime_stimulus_descrip: Set up the stimuli that participants will respond to: text, images, colors, or custom WebGL content.
help_steps_reactionTime_taskType_descrip: Choose a task paradigm: Simple RT, Choice RT, Go/No-Go, Stroop, Flanker, IAT, or custom.
help_steps_reactionTime_timing_descripti: Configure timing with frame-accurate, high-resolution onset: stimulus duration, inter-stimulus interval, response timeout.
help_steps_reactionTime_trials_descripti: Define the sequence of trials, randomization, and block structure for your reaction time task.
help_steps_statisticalFeedback_chart_des: Pick a chart type to visualize the data: histogram, bar chart, line chart, or gauge.
help_steps_statisticalFeedback_interpret: Define ranges (e.g., Low/Medium/High) with colors to help participants understand their scores.
help_steps_statisticalFeedback_metric_de: Select which metric to display: mean, median, standard deviation, percentiles, or z-scores.
help_steps_statisticalFeedback_preview_d: See a real-time preview of how the statistical feedback will appear to participants.
help_steps_statisticalFeedback_source_de: Choose where data comes from: current session only, cohort aggregate, or participant comparison.
help_steps_variables_add_description: Click to create a new variable. Choose a name, type, and optionally set a formula or default value.
help_steps_variables_defaultValue_descri: Set an initial value that applies before any formula computation or response.
help_steps_variables_dependencies_descri: Visualize how variables depend on each other. The graph updates automatically as you add formulas.
help_steps_variables_formula_description: Write formulas using 47+ functions: IF(), SUM(), AVG(), CONCAT(), NOW(), and more. Reference other variables by name.
help_steps_variables_list_description: All defined variables appear here with their type, formula, and current value.
help_steps_variables_scope_description: Global variables persist across the entire questionnaire. Page and block scopes limit visibility.
help_steps_variables_types_description: Choose from 9 types: Number, Text, True/False, Date, Time, List, Object, Reaction Time, and Stimulus Onset.
help_tips_allowOther: Add an "Other" free-text option so participants can provide responses not in your predefined list.
help_tips_attentionCheck: Flag this question as an attention check. Failed checks can trigger data quality warnings.
help_tips_carryForward: Automatically carry options or responses from a previous question into this one.
help_tips_chartType: How to visualize the data. Histograms show distributions, bar charts compare categories.
help_tips_flowCondition: JavaScript expression using variable names: age >= 18 && consent === true.
help_tips_flowIterations: Maximum number of times the loop will repeat. Use conditions to break early.
help_tips_flowTarget: The page or question to navigate to when the condition evaluates to true.
help_tips_flowType: Branch: conditional navigation. Skip: jump ahead. Loop: repeat section. Terminate: end questionnaire.
help_tips_formulaEditor: Write formulas using built-in functions. Press Ctrl+Space for autocomplete suggestions.
help_tips_matrixRows: Each row represents a separate item that participants rate using the same set of column options.
help_tips_metric: The statistical measure to compute and display: mean, median, percentiles, z-score, etc.
help_tips_multiline: Allow participants to enter multiple lines of text. Useful for open-ended qualitative responses.
help_tips_randomizeOptions: Randomly shuffle the order of response options for each participant to reduce order bias.
help_tips_required: When enabled, participants must answer this question before proceeding to the next page.
help_tips_scaleLabels: Add labels to the endpoints and midpoint of your scale to help participants interpret the values.
help_tips_scoreInterpretation: Define score ranges with labels and colors to provide meaningful feedback to participants.
help_tips_sourceMode: Current Session: this participant only. Cohort: all participants. Comparison: participant vs group.
help_tips_validation: Add validation rules to ensure response quality: min/max length, patterns, custom expressions.
help_tips_variableDefault: The initial value before any formula computation or participant response.
help_tips_variableFormula: Formulas auto-compute using 47+ functions. Reference other variables by name: SUM(score1, score2).
help_tips_variableScope: Global: available everywhere. Page: reset per page. Block: reset per block.
help_tips_variableType: The data type determines what values the variable can hold and which operations are valid.
help_tours_dashboardWelcome_description: Get familiar with your QDesigner dashboard
help_tours_designerIntro_description: Learn the questionnaire designer layout and tools
help_tours_flowControl_description: Set up conditional branching, loops, and skip logic
help_tours_statisticalFeedback_descripti: Configure real-time statistical feedback for participants
help_tours_variables_description: Master variables, formulas, and computed values
questions_validation_invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address
validation_alphanumeric: Only letters and numbers are allowed
validation_email: Please enter a valid email address
validation_maxLength: Must be no more than {max} characters
validation_phone: Please enter a valid phone number
